moduleSummary.blockSummary: **Junior Java Backend Developer** building **Spring Boot REST APIs** with **Spring Security (JWT)**, **Spring Data JPA**, and **SQL**. Delivered portfolio projects including an **AI-powered CV generator** (job scraping + **SSE** live progress) and a **PDF document layout engine** (ECS + **auto-pagination**). Strong foundation in **Core/Advanced Java** and concurrency fundamentals. Focused on **clean architecture**, **automation**, and **reliable backend services**.

**Software Engineer & aspiring Consultant** with a strong background in designing and building secure, high-performance **REST APIs** using **Java** and the **Spring Boot** ecosystem. An exceptional and pragmatic **communicator**, comfortable engaging with both senior non-technical staff and technical colleagues to deliver effective solutions. Proven ability to rapidly absorb new technical information and adapt to changing requirements, with a focus on applying backend skills to **cloud environments (AWS/Azure/GCP)**.

technicalSkills.name: Technical Skills
modulePoints: **Backend & API Development:** Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA (Hibernate), Spring Security, REST API Design, JWT, Jackson, OpenAPI/Swagger
**Cloud & DevOps:** Docker, Docker Compose, Git, GitHub, Maven, Flyway. *Quick to learn and apply cloud-native services on AWS, Azure, and GCP.*
**Databases & Data:** MySQL, Oracle SQL, SQLite, JDBC
**Core Java:** OOP, Collections, Streams API, Multithreading & Concurrency (ExecutorService, Locks), IO/NIO
**Testing & Quality:** JUnit 5, AssertJ, Postman, Debugging, Logging
**Professional:** Stakeholder Communication, Problem-Solving, Adaptability, Self-Directed Learning, Team Collaboration

educationCertifications.name: Education & Certifications
modulePoints: **Spring Boot & REST API Mastery** – *Ongoing* | Apr 2024 – Present - Focused on building and securing RESTful APIs, a core skill for modern digital engineering.
**Oracle SQL Course** – Self-Study | Jan 2024 – Jun 2024 - Developed deep understanding of database management and data manipulation.
**Advanced Java Course (OCA-aligned)** – Self-Study | Dec 2023 – Jan 2024 - Solidified fundamentals in multithreading, functional programming, and Streams API.
**BSc in Hydraulic Engineering** – Kherson State Agrarian and Economic University, Ukraine | Sep 2012 – May 2017 (*Grade: 2.1*)

projects.name: Projects
modulePoints: **CVRewriter (AI-Powered API Service)** – *Portfolio Project* Developed a full-stack application centred around a **Spring Boot REST API** to generate tailored CVs. **Implemented** a secure backend with **JWT authentication** and a processing pipeline that **integrated with a third-party AI solution** (Gemini API). Engineered real-time client updates using Server-Sent Events (SSE).

**Shopping Cart API (E-commerce Backend)** – *Portfolio Project*
Built a secure e-commerce **web API** for product and cart management. Implemented secure endpoints with authentication and role-based authorisation, robust input validation, and clear API documentation using **OpenAPI/Swagger**. This project demonstrates the ability to build, maintain, and improve a typical software application.

**GraphCompose (Custom Java/Kotlin Module)** – *Portfolio Project*
Designed and developed a custom Java/Kotlin library for declarative PDF generation using an Entity-Component-System (ECS) architecture. This project showcases the ability to develop complex custom modules and a deep understanding of software engineering principles.

**Custom GeminiConnection (API Client Library)** – *Portfolio Project*
Created a custom Java client to **integrate with a third-party solution** (Google's Gemini API). The library supports streaming responses and structured JSON parsing, demonstrating the ability to work effectively with external services and APIs.
